title: acalypha wilderi
intro: Acalypha wilderi, also known as Acalypha hispida, is a species of plant in the family Euphorbiaceae, commonly found in tropical regions. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Acalypha wilderi include its ability to treat fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as its use as an antidote for snake bites. The plant can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or decoction, and is also used in traditional folk medicine in various parts of the world.
